name: Rocket Poker
short_description: Master the art of deck building in this rogue like dopamine infused poker adventure. Combine enhancements to boost your deck with up to 18 unique modifiers on each card at once.
detailed_description:
Deck Building Rogue Like is the genre but the game will feel more like a puzzle as you experiment with building powerful decks in order to overcome the challenges of Rocket Poker. Once you master the art of deck building you will cackle as you rack up thousands of points a hand and dominate the bosses, only to be humiliated when you swap over to the next hardest difficulty.

  • 8 Challenging, Random Boss and Elite Encounters with Unique Mechanics to combat your deck.
  • 18 Enhancements that can all go on the same card at once.
  • Multiple paths with risk/reward management each level.
  • 7 Levels of exponentially increasing difficulty each run.
  • 3 difficulty settings that are game changing well beyond simply modifying the points needed per level.
